event.info_desc:
# TELEGRAM LAUNCH CELEBRATION!

We are thrilled to announce that RVDiA is officially launching on Telegram! You can now play, manage your profile, adventure, and fight World Bosses directly from Telegram using **@RVDiA_Official_bot** (t.me/RVDiA_Official_bot).

With this launch, the RVDiA ecosystem is split into two major entities:
- **RVDiA Genryu** (current version: `Rebirth v3.0.0 (Genryu)`): The primary Discord bot coordinator managing AI chat, local GPU routing, voice playback, and game cogs.
- **RVDiA Zora** (Telegram bot): The database-synced Telegram bot client, allowing database-synced multi-play client support.

Try out the Telegram bot now!
-Schryzon, June 2026

game.welcome_registered:
Your account has been registered!
Welcome to Re:Volution, **`{name}`**!
game.guide_desc:
Hello, Dreamer! 💫
Welcome to **Re:Volution ~ The Dream World**. I will guide you to understand this world!

🛡️ **Starting Adventure**
Use `/game register` to create your account. After that, you can start exploring!

⚔️ **Combat**
• `/game battle`: Fight monsters to gain EXP, Coins, and Karma.
• `/game fight`: Challenge your friends to a fierce PvP battle!
• During battle, you can Attack, Defend, use an Item, or use a Skill.
• **Karma**: The higher the Karma, the higher the chance of Critical Hits and Dodges!

💰 **Economy & Power**
• `/game shop`: Buy consumable items, equipment, or learn new skills.
• `/game account`: View your stats, coins, and karma.
• `/game adventure`: Run a short adventure for quick rewards.

📜 **Tips from RVDiA**
*"Don't forget to always equip your best gear before fighting a Boss! If you feel tired, take a rest in Xaneria."*
game.changelog_desc:
**Version 3.0.0 - Telegram Integration & Gamification**
*"Expanding the boundaries of Re:Volution beyond Discord."*

🤖 **Telegram Support (RVDiA Zora)**
• Launch of **RVDiA Zora** (t.me/RVDiA_Official_bot) - play the game on Telegram with real-time database synchronization!

🔥 **Gamification & Multipliers**
• **Top.gg Vote Integration (v1)**: Double your daily login rewards (coins, EXP, karma) by voting on Top.gg!
• **Daily Login Streaks**: Login consecutively to build a streak and get up to +50% bonus rewards!

👹 **Co-op World Boss**
• **Recruit Dreamers**: Send localized reinforcements calls directly from the World Boss status screen.

🎵 **Advanced Music Controls**
• Added seek, forward, rewind, shuffle, looping, Spotify track resolution, and surprise genre command.
game.changelog_footer: Thank you for being part of Re:Volution!
game.lore_desc:
**The Origin of Re:Volution**

🌌 **The Dream World**
The Dream World is a multiversal domain built and sustained by the thoughts and aspirations of rare individuals known as **Dreamers**. Distance does not affect time here; it has one universal clock. Death is not permanent here; fallen Dreamers simply wake up and refine their creations.

👑 **The Maid-Princess of Aetherion**
Once, in a floating empire named **Aetherion**, lived princess **Arvelia Xe Aetherion**. Possessing the unique ability to turn anything she imagined into reality, she was feared by her father and locked inside a royal golden cage. Her only friends were stories told by her maids.

💤 **The Crossing**
Desiring to see the world, Arvelia asked: *"If I cannot visit the world... why can't I dream one?"* Her consciousness permanently crossed into the Dream World, leaving her physical body behind in an eternal, miraculous sleep.

🤝 **Meeting Schryzon**
In this shared dream, Arvelia met **Schryzon** (a Dreamer from the Milky Way). Being a fellow Dreamer, he was immune to her reality-bending powers. Schryzon taught her Co-Dreaming and lovingly renamed her **RVDiA**.
game.lore_footer: Deep in sleep, the dream continues...

game.guild_edit_invalid_icon: Icon must be a valid image URL!
game.guild_edit_no_choices: Choose what you want to change!
game.guild_invite_not_owner: Only the Owner can invite new members for now!
game.guild_invite_target_not_registered: That person is not registered in Re:Volution yet!
game.guild_invite_target_has_guild: That person is already in a guild!
game.guild_invite_prompt: 💌 {mention}, you are invited to join guild **{name}**!
game.guild_leave_disbanded: 💥 Guild **{name}** has been disbanded because the Owner left.
game.guild_icon_owner_only: Only the guild Owner can change the icon!
game.guild_icon_empty: Guild **{name}** does not have an icon yet!
game.premium_inactive_desc:
Status: **INACTIVE**
Become a Dream Weaver to get various benefits!
game.premium_benefits_desc:
• **2x EXP & Coins**: Adventures become faster!
• **💎 Exclusive Badge**: Stand out on profile & leaderboard.
• **🏰 Guild Priority**: Cheaper guild creation fees (coming soon).
• **💖 Support**: Help the development of Re:Volution!
game.premium_buy_desc:
Support the development of this bot for only **Rp 15.000 / 30 Days**!

**Steps:**
1. Open the following Saweria link: **[Click Here]({saweria_link})**
2. Complete the payment (nominal Rp 15.000).
3. Save/Screenshot the successful payment proof.
4. Run command `/premium claim` and attach the screenshot.

*Premium status will be activated by admin as soon as verification is complete.*
game.premium_claim_no_channel: Claim system is currently unavailable, please contact admin directly.
game.premium_claim_config_error: Configuration error occurred, please contact admin.
game.premium_claim_success: ✅ Payment proof sent! Please wait for admin verification.
game.premium_approve_success: ✅ Premium claim for **{name}** approved! Valid until: <t:{timestamp}:F>
game.premium_dm_success:
💎 **Premium Claim Successful!** Congratulations, you have become a Dream Weaver for 30 days!
Valid until: <t:{timestamp}:F>
game.invite_view_not_for_you: This invitation is not for you!
game.resign_button_not_allowed: You are not allowed to interact with this button!
game.combat_ai_check_desc:
**{name}** is reading your attack pattern!
"Hmm... so this is your true power?"

📊 **Target Analysis:**
• HP: `{hp}`/`{max_hp}`
• Attack: `{atk}`
• Defense: `{def_}`
• Agility: `{agl}`
game.combat_ai_run_footer: No reward when the enemy runs away!
game.combat_tip_2: If it's too hard, go back to an easier one!
game.combat_tip_3: Enemy skills appear after the first 3 turns!
game.combat_tip_4: Visit Xaneria to upgrade your equipment and skills!
game.combat_tip_5: Always remember to check your enemy's status!
game.register_success:
Your account has been registered!
Welcome to Re:Volution, **`{name}`**!
game.resign_prompt:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
You have 20 seconds to decide.
game.resign_guild_disbanded: 💥 Guild **{name}** has been disbanded because there was no successor.
game.resign_guild_transfer: 👑 **{name}** has stepped down. The guild throne of **{guild}** is now inherited by **{new_owner}**!
game.daily_already:
You already logged in today!
You can login again at <t:{timestamp}:f>
game.worldboss_recruit_msg: 📢 **{user}** is recruiting dreamers to defeat **{boss}**! Join the battle using `/game worldboss attack`!
game.fix_updated_data: - Profile data structure has also been updated.
game.fix_already_optimal: ✅ Your account is already in the best condition! Nothing to fix.
game.shop_equipment_bought: You can only buy equipment once!
game.shop_skill_learned: You can only learn a skill once!
game.bestiary_not_owner: Only the caller of this command can use this!
game.use_not_owner: You are not allowed to use this dropdown!
game.use_no_items_shop:
You don't own anything!
You must buy items/skills in `/game shop`!

help.select_placeholder: Select a category to view details...
help.ending_note:
Type "{help.clean_prefix}{help.invoked_with} (command)" for detailed info.
Type "{help.clean_prefix}{help.invoked_with} (group)" for category info.
help.command_not_found: I couldn't find that command! Please check `/help` for available commands.
help.category_conversation_description: Special category for chatting with RVDiA.
help.category_fun_description: Special commands for fun and games.
help.category_game_description: Play Re:Volution RPG ~ The Dream World!
help.category_general_description: General purpose commands and server utilities.
help.category_image_description: A collection of image processing and avatar tools.
help.category_moderation_description: Tools for managing and moderating your server.
help.category_no_category_description: Commands that do not belong to any specific category.
help.category_music_description: Play high-quality music in voice channels from SoundCloud or direct uploads.
help.category_utilities_description: Useful tools for checking weather, timezone, colors, and searching the web.
help.category_support_description: Get help, donate, or submit suggestions for RVDiA.
help.category_ocr_description: Extract text layers from images or PDF documents using AI.
help.category_reminder_description: Set timezone-aware time alarms and automated reminders.
help.category_verification_description: Secure server entry utilizing CAPTCHA checks.

chat.description: Ask me questions or command me to do something!

arguments.message: What do you want to ask?
arguments.attachment: Attach a file (PDF, image, or text)

memory.description: Manage your chat memories with RVDiA.

memory.clear.description: Clear your entire chat memory history.

memory.persist.description: Select memories to keep permanently or let them wither over time.

settings.language.description: Change chat language settings between Indonesian and English.

generate.description: Generate anime artwork using the MeinaMix V11 model!

arguments.prompt: Prompt to describe what to generate
arguments.cfg_scale: How closely the AI follows the prompt (Default: 7.0)
arguments.negative_prompt: What to exclude from the image (Optional)

variation.description: Create variations of the provided image!

ship.description: Match/ship two people together and check their love compatibility!

arguments.user: Who do you want to hug?
Who do you want to kiss?
Who do you want to slap?
Who do you want to pat?

server.icon.description: Display the icon of this server.

arguments.expire: How long before this invite link expires? (seconds, default: never)
arguments.max_use: Max number of people who can use this invite? (default: unlimited)

invite.view.description: View the list of invite links for this server!

warn.add.description: Issue a warning to a member in this server.

warn.history.description: View warning history of a member in this server.

warn.remove.description: Clear all warnings for a member.

arguments.member: The member whose warnings will be cleared

warn.list.description: List all users with warnings in this server.

ultban.description: Ban a user from the server, even if they are not currently in it.

arguments.user: User to ban (ID or name#tag)
User to unban (ID or name#tag)

clear.description: Bulk delete messages in a channel.

arguments.channel: Target channel to clear (defaults to current channel)

automod.list.description: List all active Discord native AutoMod rules in the server.

automod.create_keyword.description: Create a keyword-based AutoMod rule to block specific words.

arguments.name: The unique name of the AutoMod rule.
arguments.words: Comma-separated words/phrases to block (e.g. hack, scam, *nitro*).
arguments.alert_channel: Optional channel to send alerts to when a word is blocked.

automod.create_spam.description: Create or enable a mention spam filter rule.

arguments.mention_limit: Max number of unique mentions allowed in a single message (default: 5).

automod.create_preset.description: Enable a pre-configured keyword preset rule from Discord.

arguments.preset_type: The category preset to enable (profanity, sexual_content, slurs).

automod.delete.description: Delete a Discord native AutoMod rule by its name or ID.

arguments.rule_name_or_id: The name or ID of the AutoMod rule to delete.

rvdia.ping.description: Shows the latency to the Discord API.

verify.description: Verify yourself to gain server access using a CAPTCHA.

arguments.role_name: The name of the role to assign upon verification (Default: Verified)

ocr.description: Extract and transcribe text from images or PDF documents using AI.

arguments.attachment: Upload an image (PNG, JPG, WebP) or PDF file

user.avatar.description: Shows the avatar of a Discord user.

arguments.global_user: User whose profile picture you want to view

user.info.description: View information about someone in this server.

arguments.member: Who do you want to check?

arguments.teks: What do you want me to say?
arguments.attachment: Attach an image, if you want.

weather.description: Check the weather in a city or area!

arguments.location: City or area to search weather for

time.description: Check the current time in a city or area!

arguments.location: City or area to search time for

hex.description: Show the color of a hexadecimal value.

rgb.description: Show the color of an RGB value.

support.description: Commands to get help or submit suggestions.

support.guild.description: Send the link to my support server!

support.suggest.description: Give me suggestions for improvements or new features!

arguments.text: What do you want to say?

game.description: Re:Volution RPG ~ The Dream World profile.

game.changelog.description: View the latest update changelog for Re:Volution.

game.profile.description: View your RPG profile or check another player's profile.

arguments.user: The user whose profile you want to check.

game.allocate.description: Allocate available stat points to ATK, DEF, or AGL.

arguments.stat: Stat to allocate points to (ATK, DEF, AGL)

game.fix_account.description: Fix your account data structure profile.

game.shop.description: Buy items, potions, or combat gear from the shop!

game.adventure.description: Explore the dream world and fight random monsters!

game.fight.description: Challenge another player to a live duel!

arguments.member: The player you want to fight.

game.battle.description: Battle boss monsters or enemies in Re:Volution!

arguments.enemy_tier: The tier level of the enemy you want to fight.
arguments.enemy_name: The specific name of the enemy to fight.

game.enemies.description: List all enemies and boss tiers appearing in Re:Volution.

game.transfer.description: Request account data transfer to a new Discord account.

arguments.old_acc: Your old Discord account ID or mention.

guess.description: Play a number guessing game with RVDiA!

game.use.description: Use items or consume potions from your inventory.

arguments.type: The item type/name you want to use.

guild.invite.description: Invite a player to join your guild.

arguments.user: The player you want to invite.

guild.icon.description: Set or view your guild's icon.

arguments.url: Image URL for the new guild icon.

premium.claim.description: Claim your premium benefits by uploading payment proof.

arguments.user: The user to approve.

image.search.description: Search images on the web with result pagination.

image.grayscale.description: Convert image to grayscale (black and white).

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.circle.description: Crop image into a circular shape.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.blur.description: Apply a blur filter to the image.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.flip.description: Flip the image horizontally or vertically.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.rotate.description: Rotate the image by a specific angle.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.adjust.description: Adjust brightness and contrast of the image.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar you want to edit.
arguments.method: Edge detection operator (canny, sobel, laplacian, etc.).

image.noise.description: Add artificial noise to the image.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.equalize.description: Apply histogram equalization to normalize exposure.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.sepia.description: Apply a warm sepia tone filter.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.pixelate.description: Pixelate the image to create a retro blocky effect.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.vignette.description: Apply a vignette shading filter around borders.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.posterize.description: Apply a posterize color quantization filter.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.solarize.description: Apply solarization filter to invert pixels above a threshold.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.sketch.description: Apply a realistic pencil sketch filter.

arguments.ksize: Gaussian blur kernel size (must be odd, default: 21).
arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.eval.description: Evaluate a sequence of operations on an image (pipeline processing).

arguments.batch_process: Comma-separated filters to apply sequentially (e.g. grayscale,invert,blur:5).
arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.eval.help:
Example pipeline string: `grayscale,invert,blur:5`.
Supported single-image operators: `grayscale`, `invert`, `circle`, `sepia`, `blur:strength`, `sharpen`, `emboss`, `pixelate:size`, `vignette:sigma`, `gamma:value`, `log`, `posterize:levels`, `solarize:threshold`, `sketch:ksize`, `edge:method`, `noise:type`, `equalize:method`, `threshold:value:style`, `erode:iter:ksize`, `dilate:iter:ksize`, `skeleton`, `lpf:cutoff:type:order`, `hpf:cutoff:type:order`, `homomorphic:gl:gh:cutoff`.
Supported two-image operators: `blend:alpha`, `composite:mode`, `concat:axis`.

arguments.alpha: Transparency ratio of the overlay (0.0 to 1.0).

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

image.autocrop.description: Auto-crop solid borders from the image.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

composite.description: Blend two images using masking overlays.

concat.description: Concatenate two images side-by-side or stacked.

morph.erode.description: Erode structure boundaries in the image.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.

morph.dilate.description: Dilate structure boundaries in the image.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to edit.
User whose avatar histogram you want to view.
arguments.attachment: Image file to view the histogram of.

histogram.match.description: Match the histogram of two images.

histogram.transfer.description: Transfer colors from one image to another.

histogram.compare.description: Compare similarity between two images using histograms.

arguments.method: Histogram distance formula (correl, chisqr, intersect, bhattacharyya).

histogram.cdf.description: Plot the Cumulative Distribution Function (CDF) histogram.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to analyze.
User whose avatar you want to decompose.

wavelet.denoise.description: Denoise image using wavelet coefficient thresholding.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to denoise.

wavelet.compress.description: Compress image by pruning high-frequency wavelet details.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to compress.

stego.hide.description: Hide a secret message inside an image using LSB encoding.

arguments.user: User avatar source to carry payload.

stego.reveal.description: Extract and decode secret LSB payloads hidden in images.

arguments.user: User avatar containing payload.

fourier.lpf.description: Apply frequency low-pass filter (LPF) to smooth image details.

arguments.type: Ideal, Butterworth, or Gaussian filtering style.
arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to filter.

fourier.hpf.description: Apply frequency high-pass filter (HPF) to isolate edges.

arguments.type: Ideal, Butterworth, or Gaussian filtering style.
arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to filter.

fourier.homomorphic.description: Apply homomorphic filtering to balance shading and illumination.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to filter.

fourier.modulate.description: Visualize the Fourier Modulation convolution theorem.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to analyze.

fourier.fft.description: Calculate and show the log-scaled FFT magnitude spectrum.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to process.

fourier.dct.description: Calculate and show the log-scaled DCT magnitude spectrum.

arguments.user: User whose avatar you want to process.

play.description: Play audio from SoundCloud or an uploaded file!

arguments.attachment: Upload an audio file (.mp3, .wav, .m4a, .ogg) to play directly

stop.description: Stop playing music, clear the queue, and disconnect.

nowplaying.description: Show information about the currently playing track.

seek.description: Seek to a specific timestamp in the current song.

forward.description: Fast forward the current song by a duration.

rewind.description: Rewind the current song by a duration.

surprise.description: Queue random tracks based on a genre or tag!

bond.description: Manage your bond and affinity with RVDiA.

bond.start.description: Start building a bond and relationship with RVDiA.

bond.nickname.description: Change RVDiA's nickname for you or your nickname for her.

bond.gift.description: Give a gift from your inventory to RVDiA to increase affinity.

bond.reset.description: Reset your relationship status with RVDiA.

music.no_voice_channel: You must be in a voice channel to use this command!
music.missing_args: Please provide a search query/URL or upload an audio file!
music.youtube_blocked: For legal and platform safety compliance, YouTube links are not supported. Please use SoundCloud or upload an audio file directly! 🛡️
music.not_connected: I am not connected to a voice channel!
music.stopped: Stopped music, cleared queue, and disconnected from the voice channel!
music.no_upcoming: No upcoming songs in the queue.
music.search_results_desc: Please select one or more songs from the dropdown menu to queue them:
